description.value:
A teardrop moonstone on a silver chain. While worn it bends light oddly, making the bearer hard to pick out in a crowd.

Curse. In combat, allies cannot see the wearer clearly: they count as heavily obscured to allied creatures within 30 feet for purposes of targeting helpful spells and attacks (foes are unaffected). The wearer still sees themselves normally.

unidentified.description: A silver chain with a pale moonstone. The stone seems to hold a second reflection inside it.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: A protective charm said to turn aside hostile eyes in a brawl.
cursedMeta.trueNature: In combat the wearer is heavily obscured to allies within 30 ft for targeting helpful effects; enemies perceive them normally.

curse.name: Veilglass Moon
curse.description: While attuned, during combat allies treat the wearer as heavily obscured within 30 feet for the purpose of beneficial targeting; hostile creatures are unaffected.

hints: Allies squint past the bearer when lining up a cure; the stone shows two moons.

escalation.effect: Friendly fire near-misses increase; blamed on smoke or glare.
Healers describe the wearer as 'flickering' on initiative ties.
